title: Invoice Preparation
description: Step-by-step guide for preparing and submitting invoices in Apptricity.

steps.title: Prerequisites
steps.description: Gather everything you need before starting the invoice process.

items.label: Have all invoices ready for processing
Prepare digital copies (scanned or photographed) of each invoice
Have account numbers available for distribution

steps.title: Log In
steps.content:
Navigate to the Apptricity login page provided by your organization. Enter your network credentials (username and password). If you do not have access, contact your department administrator or IT support to request an account.

Tip: Bookmark the login page for quick access in the future.

steps.title: Dashboard Overview
steps.description: Orient yourself with the Apptricity home screen.
steps.content:
After logging in, you will see the Apptricity home dashboard. Key areas include:

- **Navigation Menu** — Located on the left side, use this to access Invoices, Reports, and Settings.
- **Recent Activity** — Shows your most recent invoices and their status.
- **Quick Actions** — Shortcuts to create a new invoice, view pending approvals, or search existing records.

To begin a new invoice, click "Create New Invoice" from Quick Actions or navigate to Invoices → New.

output.title: Invoice Summary

steps.title: Return Fields
steps.description: Complete only if this invoice is a return or correction.

fields.label: Correction Notes
fields.placeholder: Describe what needs to be corrected

steps.title: Add Distribution
steps.description: Assign the invoice amount to the appropriate department and account.

steps.title: Upload eDocs
steps.description: Attach supporting documentation to your invoice.

items.label: Scan or photograph all supporting documents
Rename files with a clear naming convention (e.g. VendorName_INV-001.pdf)
Upload documents using the eDocs attachment feature
Verify all attachments appear correctly in the invoice record

steps.title: Review & Submit
steps.description: Final verification before submitting the invoice.

items.label: Verify all invoice fields are correct (vendor, amount, date, type)
Confirm distribution total matches the invoice amount
Confirm all eDocs are attached and readable
Click Submit to send the invoice for approval
Note your confirmation number for future reference

steps.title: Post-Submission
steps.content:
After submission, your invoice enters the approval workflow. Here's what to expect:

- **Approval Chain** — Your invoice will be routed to the designated approver(s) based on your department and the invoice amount.
- **Status Tracking** — You can check the status of your invoice at any time from the dashboard under Recent Activity.
- **Recall** — If you need to make changes after submission, you can recall the invoice from the Invoices list (if it hasn't been approved yet). Select the invoice and click "Recall."
- **Notifications** — You will receive email notifications when your invoice is approved, returned, or requires action.

If you have questions about the approval process, contact your department's fiscal coordinator.
